info.title: NovaRewards API
info.description: REST API for the Nova Rewards blockchain loyalty platform. User endpoints require a Bearer JWT from `POST /auth/login`. Merchant endpoints require an `x-api-key` header.

servers.description: Local development legacy alias for v1

merchantApiKey.name: x-api-key
merchantApiKey.description: Merchant API key returned on registration (shown once).

post.summary: Rotate refresh token and issue new tokens
Request a Stellar wallet challenge nonce
Submit signed challenge to obtain JWT tokens

get.summary: Get off-chain point balance for a wallet

post.summary: Register a new merchant (returns one-time API key)
Distribute NOVA tokens to a customer wallet

409.description: Out of stock / insufficient points / inactive

post.summary: Verify and record a Stellar transaction

get.summary: NOVA payment history for a wallet (Horizon with DB fallback)

post.summary: Check whether a wallet has an active NOVA trustline
Build unsigned changeTrust XDR for Freighter signing

get.summary: Get authenticated user live NOVA balance
Get top users by earned points
List drops the authenticated user qualifies for
Paginated delivery log for a webhook

post.summary: Send a test event to the webhook URL

get.summary: Full-text search across rewards, campaigns, and users

patch.summary: Toggle or update a feature flag

post.summary: Remove an IP from the abuse blocklist

get.summary: Comprehensive health check (DB, Redis, Stellar, disk, memory)
Readiness check — 200 only when DB and cache are reachable
